definition: Grade-based entry model with confluence scoring. Weighted components sum to 100, plus synergy bonuses (capped +5). Liquidity sweep is a binary gate, not scored. Grade determines risk allocation.
depends_on: market_structure (Layer 1: HTF bias and structure alignment)

scoring_weights._description: Config-driven weights (config.yaml). Must sum to 100. Liquidity is 0 because sweep is a gate, not a gradient.

structure.scoring: CHoCH = 60% of weight, BOS = 40%. Bias aligned = +40%. Capped at weight max.
structure.note: HTF structure (H4/D1) is the #1 signal. CHoCH > BOS for reversals.

liquidity.scoring: GATE — not scored. If no opposite-direction sweep exists, pipeline skips the trade entirely.
liquidity.note: ICT: sweep is binary. SSL sweep (BEARISH) confirms BULLISH, BSL sweep (BULLISH) confirms BEARISH. Continuation sweeps (same-direction) are intentionally excluded — they are trend-following, not ICT reversal confirmation.

order_block.scoring: OB present near price = 60%. High quality OB = +40%. Mid quality = +25%.

fvg.scoring: Active FVG in direction = 50%. Quality tier bonus = 0-30%. Price inside FVG = +20%.

session.scoring: Kill zone = 60%. Silver Bullet = +30%. Macro time = +20%. Lunch = -50% penalty.

ote.scoring: Price in OTE zone (0.618-0.786 fib) = 100%. Correct P/D zone but not OTE = 40%.

synergy_bonuses._description: Additive bonuses for genuine ICT confluences. Capped at +5 total. Score capped at 100.

ob_fvg_stacked.condition: Active OB present AND price is inside a directional FVG
ob_fvg_stacked.ict_basis: Propulsion block — OB + FVG overlap is the highest-probability entry zone in ICT

sweep_displacement.condition: Liquidity sweep confirmed AND active FVG exists in trade direction
sweep_displacement.ict_basis: Sweep + FVG = displacement confirmation. The sweep creates the imbalance, the FVG proves it.

sweep_direction_logic._critical: This is the most important directional logic in the system.
sweep_direction_logic.definition: sweep_direction = the direction price moved TO execute the sweep
sweep_direction_logic.BSL_sweep: Direction.BULLISH — price swept UP through highs. Confirms BEARISH reversal.
sweep_direction_logic.SSL_sweep: Direction.BEARISH — price swept DOWN through lows. Confirms BULLISH reversal.
sweep_direction_logic.filter: scorer uses `sweep_direction != trade_direction` — only opposite-direction sweeps count
sweep_direction_logic.continuation_sweeps: Intentionally excluded. Same-direction sweeps are trend-following, not ICT manipulation confirmation. Do NOT 'fix' the != filter to ==.

grade_C.description: Paper trade only unless exceptional context

gates._description: Hard gates that block trades regardless of score. Code implements one; Claude prompt handles qualitative gates.

code_gate.liquidity_sweep: No opposite-direction sweep = trade skipped by pipeline. This is the only hard-coded gate.

claude_prompt_gates._note: These are enforced qualitatively by Claude's decision prompt, not by the numeric scorer.
claude_prompt_gates.wrong_zone: BUY in premium or SELL in discount = auto-downgrade or SKIP
claude_prompt_gates.no_structure: No HTF structure alignment = Claude flags as low-confidence
claude_prompt_gates.no_2R_target: Draw-on-liquidity target < 2R = Claude should reduce position or skip

grade_a_criteria.description: Score >= 80. Sweep gate passed. Every scoring component contributing.

component_checklist.structure: HTF CHoCH or BOS + bias aligned (~30 pts)
component_checklist.order_block: Valid OB near price, ideally high quality (~20 pts)
component_checklist.fvg: Active FVG in direction, price in or near FVG (~18 pts)
component_checklist.session: Active kill zone or Silver Bullet (~12 pts)
component_checklist.ote: Price in OTE zone (0.618-0.786 fib) (~12 pts)

grade_b_criteria.description: Score 65-79. Sweep gate passed. Missing 1-2 elements.
common_gaps: OTE not reached, but correct P/D zone (-7.2 pts)
FVG present but no OB overlap (-12 pts)

grade_c_criteria.description: Score 50-64. Sweep gate passed but multiple components weak.

grade_d_skip.description: Score 35-49. Insufficient confluence for live trading.

bridge_integration.ict_score_field: TradeDecision.ict_score = total from weighted scorer + synergy
bridge_integration.grade_field: TradeDecision.grade set by bridge config grade_thresholds (A:80, B:65, C:50, D:35)
bridge_integration.risk_pct_field: TradeDecision.risk_pct derived from rules.json grade_risk_table → FTMO risk module
bridge_integration.paper_always: All grades recorded in paper shadow for audit trail

tp_targeting.bridge: Uses draw_on_liquidity (DOL) — nearest unswept external liquidity
tp_targeting.trading_ai_v2: Uses HTF FVG/OB as TP targets
tp_targeting.note: Both are valid ICT approaches. DOL is the orthodox target; HTF FVG/OB is a conservative alternative.
